view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a primary admission path with secondary paths active is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a primary admission path with secondary paths active is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence indicates that the system successfully supports both queue and online bookings under a single offer version, as described in the linked use case. The prior steps confirm that both admission methods are operational, with successful bookings recorded for both the primary and concurrent attempts. This directly aligns with the requirement of having a primary admission path for default UX routing while maintaining secondary paths.
